title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Expeditors India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Expeditors India
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
